_comment: The loop's contract. Every line is a pre-flight checklist item (Ch 18). CLI flags override these.
_three_hard_stops: Ch 13 — none of these is optional
_durability: Ch 15 — commit each iteration; push for Level-3 (survives the machine)
_blast_radius: Ch 16 — least privilege. acceptEdits not skip-permissions; branch-only; no prod creds.
